title: Outsunny Camping Folding Chair — With Armrests & Cup Holder
short_description: Comfortable camping folding chair with padded armrests and integrated cup holder. Foldable, lightweight, supports up to 265 lbs.
long_description: The Outsunny folding chair combines comfort and practicality: padded armrests, a convenient cup holder, and a sturdy steel frame make it the perfect companion for camping, fishing, or festivals. It sets up and folds down in seconds and can be stored compactly. Supports up to 265 lbs.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who value practical features: Padded armrests, Integrated cup holder, Quick folding mechanism.
